# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1beta1
kind: Elasticsearch
metadata:
  name: my-elasticsearch
spec:
  version: "7.10.2"
  nodeSets:
    - name: default
      count: 3
      resources:
        requests:
          memory: 4Gi
          cpu: "1"
        limits:
          memory: 8Gi
          cpu: "2"
      config:
        cluster.name: my-elasticsearch-cluster
        discovery.zen.minimum_master_nodes: 2
      persistence:
        size: 50Gi
        storageClass: "standard"
    - name: snapshot-node
      count: 1
      resources:
        requests:
          memory: 4Gi
          cpu: "1"
        limits:
          memory: 8Gi
          cpu: "2"
      config:
        cluster.name: my-elasticsearch-cluster
        discovery.zen.minimum_master_nodes: 2
      persistence:
        size: 50Gi
        storageClass: "standard"
  snapshotRepository:
    name: s3-snapshot-repo
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: "my-snapshot-bucket"
      region: "us-east-1"
      endpoint: "https://s3.amazonaws.com"
      accessKeyId: "your-access-key-id"
      secretAccessKey: "your-secret-access-key"
  snapshotSchedule:
    name: daily-backup
    cronExpression: "0 2 * * *"
    repositoryName: s3-snapshot-repo
